message:
Command `# OpenROAD CRASHED (SEGFAULT) during CTS! Stack trace shows crash inside openroad.
# The crash is not a design error - it's a tool bug in OpenROAD 2026-02-17.
# This happened during CTS step 61 at 13:23.

# Check CTS log for details
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "=== CTS log tail ==="
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/openroad-cts.log" 2>/dev/null | tail -30 || echo "No CTS log"
echo ""
echo "=== state_out for CTS? ==="
ls -la "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null || echo "No state_out"
echo ""
echo "=== Look for OpenROAD crash details in librelane log ==="
grep -i "crash\|abort\|signal\|segfault\|SIGSEGV\|stack" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -10` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# OpenROAD CRASHED (SEGFAULT) during CTS! Stack trace shows crash inside openroad.
# The crash is not a design error - it's a tool bug in OpenROAD 2026-02-17.
# This happened during CTS step 61 at 13:23.

# Check CTS log for details
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "=== CTS log tail ==="
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/openroad-cts.log" 2>/dev/null | tail -30 || echo "No CTS log"
echo ""
echo "=== state_out for CTS? ==="
ls -la "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null || echo "No state_out"
echo ""
echo "=== Look for OpenROAD crash details in librelane log ==="
grep -i "crash\|abort\|signal\|segfault\|SIGSEGV\|stack" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -10", "timeout": 10}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# OpenROAD CRASHED (SEGFAULT) during CTS! Stack trace shows crash inside openroad.
# The crash is not a design error - it's a tool bug in OpenROAD 2026-02-17.
# This happened during CTS step 61 at 13:23.

# Check CTS log for details
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "=== CTS log tail ==="
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/openroad-cts.log" 2>/dev/null | tail -30 || echo "No CTS log"
echo ""
echo "=== state_out for CTS? ==="
ls -la "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null || echo "No state_out"
echo ""
echo "=== Look for OpenROAD crash details in librelane log ==="
grep -i "crash\|abort\|signal\|segfault\|SIGSEGV\|stack" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -10
